summary: The implementation provides a comprehensive luxury fragrance website with most required features. It includes a 3D hero section with Three.js, scroll-triggered animations, multiple content sections (Essence, Fragrance Notes, Signature Collection, Brand Philosophy, Ending), smooth scrolling, luxury design system, and responsive layout. However, several specific technical requirements are either missing or incompletely implemented, particularly around advanced scroll animation libraries, sophisticated transitions, and some visual effects.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use GSAP ScrollTrigger or Lenis for fluid, synchronized scroll motion
missing_requirements.reason: The implementation uses basic CSS smooth scrolling and manual scroll event handlers, but does not integrate GSAP ScrollTrigger or Lenis library as specified

missing_requirements.requirement: Include subtle parallax movement on text and background
missing_requirements.reason: While text fade-in and transform effects are implemented, there is no evidence of parallax scrolling effects where elements move at different rates relative to scroll position

missing_requirements.requirement: Include light floating particle effects in each note section
missing_requirements.reason: The NoteSection component includes static particle divs with animation classes, but there is no implementation of actual floating particle effects similar to the 3D particles in the hero section

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement smooth scrolling library (Lenis or GSAP ScrollTrigger)
missing_requirements.reason: The specified smooth scrolling libraries (Lenis or GSAP ScrollTrigger) are not integrated. Only native CSS smooth scrolling is used

missing_requirements.requirement: Lazy loading is implemented for images and heavy content
missing_requirements.reason: While a LazyImage component exists, it is not actually used in any of the sections. Images are loaded directly without lazy loading implementation
